rulings.Case Title: UNITED STATES FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ARROWOOD INDEMNITY COMPANY F/K/A ROYAL INDEMNITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 27, 2010, line 9, DEFENDANTS ARROWOOD INDEMNITY COMPANY F/K/A ROYAL INDEMNITY, UNITED STATES FIDELITY AND GUARANTY COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion granted, plaintiff's request for continuance denied. Plaintiff's complaint was limited, and plaintiff may not now argue a broader scope of liability or right of indemnification. Even if Missouri law applies, its statute of repose do not bar this claim. Mo. Rev. Stat. sec. 516.097 applies to tort actions. As a matter of law, the express indemnity provisions in the job contracts 6100 and 7100 bar plaintiff's claim for equitable indemnity. Hartford Casualty Insurance Company vs. Mt. Hawly Insurance Company (2004) 123 Cal.App. 4th 278, =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SAN KEUN LEE VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NA BUSINESS ENTITY UNKNOWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 27, 2010, line 10, DEFENDANTS JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled as to 1st cause of action (declaratory relief) as withdrawn. Demurrer overruled as to 2nd cause of action (B&P sec. 17200). Plaintiff states a claim for unlawful business practice based on defendants' violations of CC sec. 2923.5. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 3rd (CC sec. 1572) and 4th (Intentional misrepresentation.) Causes of action to plead fraud with more particularity. Demurer sustained without leave to amend as to 5th caue of action (IIED). Plaintiff fails to plead outrageous conduct. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINA S. TUNNEY VS. JONATHAN TOWER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 27, 2010, line 19, DEFENDANTS JONATHAN TOWER, and, KELLY KEISER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Is overruled, five days leave to answer. Copy of agreement not required to be attached. CCP section 1166(c)(1)(B)(iii). Attorney fees, per leave agreement, are characterized as an element of costs, not damages. CCP section 1033.5(c)(5). =(302/CWW)
